commands.name: ask
commands.description: Ask Spectre One with Dosu-backed context.

options.name: model
options.description: Optional model override, for example gpt-5.4.

options.name: private
options.description: If true, only you can see the response.

commands.name: incident
commands.description: Open an incident intake modal for deployment type, cloud plan, email, version, and failure details.

commands.name: health
commands.description: Check the worker and optional upstream connectivity.

options.name: model
options.description: Optional model override for the upstream check.
